---
title: "Ecology of Luxembourg Hoverflies"
---

```{r setup}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| results: hide
here::i_am("atlas-mnhnl.Rproj")
source(here::here("Atlas", "code", "0_Initialisation.R"))
source(here::here("Atlas", "code", "Taxonomie.R"))
source(here::here("Atlas", "code", "10_Piechart.R"))
```


# Tribes dispersion

&nbsp; Colored by subfamily

```{r Tribes}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig.height: 11
#| fig.width: 11
plot_tribe_pie(DB_taxo)
```

# Subfamilies dispersion

```{r Subfamily}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig.height: 11
#| fig.width: 11
plot_subfamily_pie(DB_taxo)
```
